name: Claude
description: Have Claude's AI responses read aloud while you follow along or multitask.
metaDescription: Use Voq to listen to Claude AI responses on claude.ai. Free text-to-speech Chrome extension with multilingual support.
steps: Install Voq from the Chrome Web Store — it is free and requires no sign-up.
Go to claude.ai and open or start a conversation.
Select the text from Claude's response that you want to hear.
Click the Voq toolbar icon or right-click and choose 'Read with Voq'.
The Voq reading panel opens and reads the selected text aloud.
You can pause, skip, or change the voice at any time from the panel.
